fetch_attempts.note: Full text looks sufficient for claim extraction.

events: The article states that according to BrainCo's system tests, manipulation performance improved linearly from 11 to 20 degrees of freedom, and showed a clear jump from 20 to 21 degrees of freedom.
The article states that the Revo second-generation hand has appeared in Unitree's public dataset and completed tasks in medical care, rehabilitation, and home scenarios.

The article states that in January this year, BrainCo raised 2 billion yuan led by IDG Capital and Walden International, which it describes as the largest single financing in the global brain-computer interface field excluding Neuralink.
techniques: The article states that Revo 3 uses fully direct-driven integrated micro-joints with backdrivability, together with self-developed high-density motors and reducers, to reduce transmission-chain wear and lag.
The article states that backdrivability is one of the key ways to bridge the sim-to-real gap because each joint can yield to external force and provide force feedback during contact.

The article states that Revo 3 combines a whole-palm tactile array for sensing object contour, softness-hardness, and slip direction with fingertip visual sensors for sub-millimeter pre-grasp alignment.
tools: The article states that the hand shown in the demo is BrainCo's latest dexterous hand product, Revo 3.

The article states that Revo 3 has 21 degrees of freedom in one hand, uses a new direct-drive and backdrivable design, includes whole-palm tactile sensing and fingertip visuotactile sensing, and reaches 70N whole-hand grip force.
The article claims that Revo 3 is the world's first dexterous hand with 20+ degrees of freedom, whole-palm tactile sensing, visuotactile sensing, and an open ecosystem.

The article states that Revo 3 has been adapted to major simulation platforms including MuJoCo, Isaac Gym, and NVIDIA Omniverse, and that BrainCo plans to release a teleoperation data-collection solution supporting full 21-DoF action capture.

ingest_sources.source_note: 超越人手！中国第一家脑机接口独角兽，要把仿生手带给机器人
